name: @prune/replay-cost
description: E2 — What-If Deterministic Replay Engine. Canonicalizes a session into hash-chained segments; on a single-segment mutation, computes the byte-identical shared prefix and the divergence point, then quantifies the replay cost (shared prefix re-served at the cache-read tier, diverged tail recomputed) versus a naive cold re-run. Distinct from @prune/replay-vault (compliance audit log): this is the cost-iteration engine. Composes @prune/replay-vault canonicalization + @prune/equivalence output gate + @prune/shared pricing. No regex, no model call in the planner, deterministic.
